scenario.context: Station 03: concretize technical requirements for protocols, components, servers, and WAN connectivity.
scenario.mission: You derive robust technical decisions for the network and services from the need.

station.profile: Protocols, components, servers, and site interconnection
constraints: Always align technical decisions with the need
Think about site interconnection and operations early

customerRequest.subject: Station 03: Technical network planning
customerRequest.body: Please specify protocols, components, server roles, and WAN connectivity for the approved target state.

questions.title: Trim the technical target state
questions.prompt: Which elements belong in a robust technical network concept? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Clean segmentation and defined service zones
Appropriate component roles for access, core, and protection
Deliberately vague protocol and server roles
options.rationale: Leads to integration problems later on.

options.text: Consider site interconnection and central services
options.rationale: Is central for a multi-site company.

options.text: Create the technical documentation only after acceptance

feedback.correct: Correct: The concept combines network structure, roles, and services well.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: Please combine segmentation, component roles, and services more cleanly.

questions.title: Choose WAN principle
questions.prompt: Which WAN decision best fits two locations with central services and predictable loads?

options.text: A secured site interconnection with defined bandwidth and centrally manageable security
options.rationale: Fits predictable loads and operational requirements.

options.text: Any internet access per site without a shared security concept
options.rationale: Makes operations, protection, and support harder.

options.text: Discuss site interconnection only after production starts
options.rationale: That would be too late for central services.

feedback.correct: Correct: Site interconnection needs predictable performance and proper protection.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: A multi-site environment needs a controlled WAN approach.

questions.title: Bandwidth in the server network
questions.prompt: Two replication jobs together generate 220 Mbit/s, plus three service groups at 90 Mbit/s each. What minimum bandwidth is needed without reserve between the server network and the core?

feedback.wrong: Please add replication and service groups correctly.

questions.title: Develop technical concept
questions.prompt: Put the path from need to technical solution in order.
items: Clarify services, protection needs, and load profile
Check WAN and data center context
correctOrder: Clarify services, protection needs, and load profile
Check WAN and data center context

feedback.correct: Correct: The design is developed systematically from the need.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please first clarify the service and load picture, then derive the technical picture.

questions.title: Justify server role
questions.prompt: Explain in 4-6 sentences how you would combine server hardware, server software, and data center requirements for this case.
questions.expectedOutline: Technical justification through service role, hardware base, and environmental requirements.

feedback.correct: Correct: The server-side planning is technically justified in a coherent way.
feedback.wrong: Please connect service role, hardware, and environmental requirements more concretely.
